### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>docker/docker-credential-helpers (github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers)</summary>

### [`v0.9.8`](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/releases/tag/v0.9.8)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.7...v0.9.8)

#### What's Changed

- update to go1.26.4
- wincred: inline label, and append to existing
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6.0.2 to 6.0.3
- build(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 6.0.0 to 6.0.1
- build(deps): bump crazy-max/.github/.github/workflows/zizmor.yml from 1.7.1 to 1.10.0
- build(deps): bump docker/bake-action from 7.1.0 to 7.2.0
- build(deps): bump docker/setup-buildx-action from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0
- build(deps): bump docker/setup-qemu-action from 4.0.0 to 4.1.0

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/docker/docker-credential-helpers/compare/v0.9.7...v0.9.8>

</details>
